title: Road to Life
writer: Osip Brik, Nikolai Ekk, Anton Makarenko
actors: Nikolay Batalov, Yvan Kyrlya, Mikhail Dzhagofarov
plot: Young hobos are brought to a new camp to become good Soviet citizens. This camp works without any guards. But crooks kill one of the young people when they try to damage the newly build railroad to that camp.
